ship.name: Clydesdale Blockade Buster
ship.description: The colonists of Antlejos V have now had a wealth of experience running crucial supplies through a hostile blockade. This modification to the venerable Clydesdale was designed to be a better solution to their needs, adding additional maneuvering thrusters and stripping excess cargo capacity in order to increase the ship's agility both in and out of orbit.
